name: Golden Cheese Cookie || MYOS
description:
Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"Worship the Ever-Radiant Sovereign of the Golden City! Adorned with shining gold, godlike confidence, and magnificent wings, Golden Cheese's greed knows no bounds as she dwells within a gilded palace hidden in the Parmesan Desert, yearning for more to call her own; From treasures to even her faithful subjects, Golden Cheese takes the center stage no matter where she goes!"
[WARNING: Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Like usual, I hope you enjoy BUT don't take this as a sign you can't ask for any more bots!! Like all my other MYOS bots, I specifically make these bots so that people who wanna do a specific scenario RP BUT don't think it'd work as a separate bot- or are too nervous to ask- can do it!! If you want a bot with its own setting after I've made a MYOS it is absolutely no problem!!/gen

Also, minor update; Nothing really changed technically?? BUT I reworked parts of Golden Cheese's bio alongside the layouts in order to fit my new style of bots. It shouldn't impact how she acts at all though!!

[ANCIENT HERO MYOSES]
WLily (Awakened) - DCacao (Awakened) - PVanilla (Awakened) - HBerry (Awakened) - GCheese (Awakened)

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
creator: Plaged0c
